acts.name: Act 1 — Incident
acts.synopsis: Act 1 opens with The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light.. (2 beats; 15% of runtime.)
key_points: The sentinel stands motionless beneath a flickering platform light.
Its shadow lingers for several seconds after movement.

acts.name: Act 2 — Mystery
acts.synopsis: Act 2 opens with A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink.. (1 beats; 30% of runtime.)
key_points: A security monitor catches it one step closer after a blink.

acts.name: Act 3 — Revelation
acts.synopsis: Act 3 opens with Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.. (1 beats; 40% of runtime.)
key_points: Red light leaks from the fractures as alarms begin to pulse.

acts.name: Act 4 — Unresolved
acts.synopsis: Act 4 opens with It advances when every witness blinks.. (1 beats; 15% of runtime.)
key_points: It advances when every witness blinks.
